'''Llorkan''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] and home to an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Army/Legends|army]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]]. Llorkan was the original destination of [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Norello]]'s ship, ''[[Happer's Way]]'', during his interrupted delivery of fifty [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|AT-ST]] walkers.

{{Planet-stub}}
